featureName: BUG-020-007: Spec 020 prescribes literal 127.0.0.1 host binds — superseded by spec 042 but no pointer recorded
planningOnlyJustification: Artifact-only supersession-pointer fix: the host-bind contract was already implemented per spec 042 (deploy/compose.deploy.yml + internal/deploy/compose_contract_test.go); this packet only back-propagates the supersededBy pointer + inline notes into spec 020's governance artifacts. There is no separate implementation spec to link because the implementation already lives under specs/042-tailnet-edge-bind-pattern/ and is certified done. Per Gate G087 planning-only justification: no runtime code paths require a downstream implementation spec.

executionHistory.summary: Spec-review surfaced P0-2: specs/020-security-hardening prescribes literal 127.0.0.1:HOST_PORT host binds and a '100% of services bind to 127.0.0.1' success metric. Spec 042-tailnet-edge-bind-pattern explicitly supersedes that prescription (deploy/compose.deploy.yml now uses fail-loud ${HOST_BIND_ADDRESS:?...} form per .github/instructions/smackerel-no-defaults.instructions.md and gate G028; infra services have no host ports: block). Spec 020 carries no supersededBy pointer to spec 042 and the affected sections carry no inline note. Code reality already matches spec 042 — this is artifact-only drift. Created 6-artifact bug folder (bug.md, spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md, state.json) at Phase 0.5. User will dispatch bubbles.implement separately.

Artifact-only fix (tdd.exempt): added additive supersessions[] entry to specs/020-security-hardening/state.json pointing to 042-tailnet-edge-bind-pattern, inline supersession notes at top of spec.md Threat Model + Network Exposure Mitigation + L279 success-metric row, and at top of design.md. All 5 Gherkin scenarios pass: 3 supersession-pointer greps now exit 0 (were exit 1 pre-fix), L269 bare-phrase proximity guard passes vacuously (the bare phrase no longer appears in spec.md), change-boundary confined to 3 files under specs/020-security-hardening/. artifact-lint passes on both parent spec 020 and this bug folder. JSON validity confirmed. Zero unchecked DoD items; zero deferral language.
